front.title: Community considerations on DNS WG structures at IETF

abstract.t:
There has been an increasing level of discussion within the IETF about the best Working Group (WG) structures for handling the wide array of DNS work being conducted within the IETF. As part of community consultation, a team coordinated by Wes Hardaker was asked to gather information from the community at large through e-mail, hallway discussions, and meetings and create a small team to discuss potential structural changes to be shared with the community. This document is the result of that effort.
The outcome of the consultation is retained for historic reference.
